recommendation: PowerPoint COM ran but returned zero shapes; open the PPTX manually in PowerPoint, clear Protected View/prompts, close it, and rerun.
Aspose exporter is not ready; install/license it before deciding on the new primary extractor.
Semantic exporters are unavailable; treat this as optional after object/SVG validation.
gate_notes: Do not accept full-slide raster backgrounds as product success.
Prefer converters that expose z-order, stable IDs, resolved colors, text runs, and table/cell structure.
SVG is an analysis artifact unless text and object identity can be mapped back to native Figma nodes.
